cards.name: Dawn
cards.quote: At dawn the dark yields, though not willingly.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Stars
cards.quote: Under the stars the weary road is less forlorn.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Hope <sprite name="hope"> to all Elves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Sun
cards.quote: The sun lays bare what shadow would conceal.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.quote: When long shadows fall, old fears wake first.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.quote: When Ulmo stirs, the deep remembers wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Halts all navy or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.quote: Some lore sleeps long before it is fit to be read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 <sprite name="mage"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: The Blade Reforged
cards.quote: A blade once broken may yet be made whole.
cards.actionEffect: Reforged from shards, it carries hope as well as edge. Target allied character gains +1 <sprite name="commander">, loses Fear <sprite name="fear">, and gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2).

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Under the hard sky of Forochel, even silence has a stern voice.

cards.name: GladdenFields
cards.quote: The Gladden Fields lie hushed, where water and reed keep old secrets.

cards.name: LondDaerEnedh
cards.quote: Lond Daer still leans upon the river, as though the age of ships were not yet done.

cards.name: BountyfulSeason
cards.quote: When the year is kind, even the poor have a full board.
cards.actionEffect: Gain +2 <sprite name="gold">, +1 <sprite name="timber">, +1 <sprite name="leather">.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Woven by the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim weave cloaks that hide even longing.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Ancient Edge
cards.quote: An ancient edge is not soon made dull.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.quote: A border well watched is a border half held.
cards.actionEffect: Eyes on the borders, always. Reveal the surrounding area, detect nearby enemies, and Halt an enemy army commander in your hex.

cards.name: Rain
cards.quote: Rain washes ash from the road and teaches patience.
cards.actionEffect: Remove Burning <sprite name="burning"> from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: The Horn Calls
cards.quote: When the horn calls, fear is put to shame.
cards.actionEffect: When the horn sounds, the scattered answer. Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> enemies in radius 3; allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and close 1 hex; enemies here are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.quote: A shield is but a promise made in wood and steel.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and if the target has Fear <sprite name="fear"> remove it.

cards.name: War spoils
cards.quote: Spoils won by war are often bitter to count.
cards.actionEffect: The spoils of war fill hands and harden hearts. Gain 2 <sprite name="iron">, 1 <sprite name="steel">, and 1 <sprite name="leather">; choose 1 allied character here to gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> or Fortified <sprite name="fortified">.

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.quote: The green herb heals where the blade has left its hurt.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Set Out at Once
cards.quote: He that lingers loses the advantage of the road.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Mounts
cards.quote: Swift mounts carry hope ahead of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Provided by the Elves
cards.quote: The Elves give with grace, not haste.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.quote: The deep remembers wrath when Ulmo stirs.
cards.actionEffect: Ulmo does not forget the sea’s sovereignty. All naval <sprite name="ws"> units on water and shore tiles take damage and are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Athelas
cards.quote: The kingly leaf comes to hand when the road is darkest.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned">/Burning <sprite name="burning">.

cards.name: Hope Reborn
cards.quote: Hope is reborn when all lesser things are spent.
cards.actionEffect: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.quote: In rough hides, much that is dear may be concealed.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn); caster gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.quote: When the call goes out, old loyalties wake.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.quote: A palisade hastily raised may still hold a night of dread.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: TheGreyCompany
cards.quote: The Grey Company rode from the North in silence, bearing the hope of the Dunedain.
cards.actionEffect: Choose allied Dunedain in radius 3 and distribute +1 <sprite name="commander">, +1 <sprite name="agent">, and +1 <sprite name="emmissary"> among them.

cards.name: Traps
cards.quote: A snare laid unseen waits longest of all.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn) and Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.quote: Well equipped hosts are less shaken by the first terror.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Kindle Dawnfire
cards.quote: Kindle dawnfire, and even fear may find a name.
cards.actionEffect: Free Peoples gain Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> as dawn breaks, and Doors of Night is dispelled.

cards.name: Ward Against the Eye
cards.quote: A ward set against the Eye is a shield for the unmarked way.
cards.actionEffect: Choose 1 allied character in this hex; they gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Hallow the Road
cards.quote: Hallow the road, and the night grows less bold.
cards.actionEffect: Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">.

cards.name: Bears
cards.quote: The bears come with the old wrath of the wild.

cards.name: Beasts
cards.quote: The beasts of the wild heed neither horn nor hedge.

cards.name: Rangers
cards.quote: The Rangers hold the wild ways while others sleep.

cards.name: Anduin
cards.quote: The Great River carries the memory of all kingdoms.

cards.name: Swordmen
cards.quote: Swordmen stand in line, and the dark breaks on them.

cards.name: Archers
cards.quote: Silently they watch, arrows nocked and ready, guardians of the shadows.

cards.name: Spearmen
cards.quote: Braced against the tide, they stand resolute, a wall of steel and valor.

cards.name: Men At Arms
cards.quote: With honor in their hearts, they march forth, champions of their lords.

cards.name: Light Cavalry
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, they strike like lightning, leaving naught but echoes.

cards.name: Bay of Forochel
cards.quote: Frozen waters cradle the restless spirits of the North.

cards.name: Gandalf
cards.quote: All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given to us.
cards.actionEffect: Encourage <sprite name="encouraged"> all controlled characters for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: Bearer of Narya
cards.quote: Where Narya burns, the heart does not yield to shadow.
cards.actionEffect: The third ring kindles courage where despair would take root. Heal 1 wounded ally in radius 1, clear Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Despair <sprite name="despair"> from all allies there, and reveal 1 hidden artifact in radius 3.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: Frodo
cards.quote: Frodo bears a burden no hand can measure.
cards.actionEffect: Clear Despair <sprite name="despair"> from all controlled characters.

cards.name: Bounders
cards.quote: A quiet watch is the first wall of the Shire.

cards.name: Foam on the Water
cards.quote: The sea remembers its own, and does not forgive.
cards.actionEffect: Drive Nazgul back to their capitals and remove <sprite name="burning">Burning from nearby units.

cards.name: Oh, Elbereth!
cards.quote: The name of the Star-Queen is not spoken in vain.
cards.actionEffect: Wound an enemy; <sprite name="halted">halt Nazgul.

cards.name: Ships
cards.quote: Upon the dark waters, timber and sail become the teeth of war.

cards.name: Hide
cards.quote: Not all who walk unseen are thieves; some are merely careful.
cards.actionEffect: For 1 turn: invisible to enemy <sprite name="scout"> scout actions, hidden from scouted hexes, and cannot be selected for duels.

cards.name: Refuse Duel
cards.quote: The coward lives; the proud man feeds the crows.
cards.actionEffect: Decline a pending duel challenge.

cards.name: Train Army
cards.quote: Discipline is the iron that outlasts the blade.
cards.actionEffect: Train your <sprite name="army">army, granting it experience.

cards.name: Scout Area
cards.quote: The wise general counts the enemy's fires before lighting his own.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal surrounding hexes and detect hidden enemy characters nearby.

cards.name: Transfer Artifact
cards.quote: Power passes most safely through hands that do not grasp.
cards.actionEffect: Pass a carried <sprite name="artifact">artifact to another character in the same hex.

cards.name: Snow
cards.quote: The whiteness of winter takes what warmth the road remembers.
cards.actionEffect: 5% chance for each unit to become Frozen <sprite name="frozen"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Gates of Morning
cards.quote: The first light undoes what darkness could not hold.
cards.actionEffect: Hope of dawn breaks the shadow — Free People gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn); Dark Servants gain Despair <sprite name="despair"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Cloudless Day
cards.quote: Under the open sky, there is no shadow for fear to hide in.
cards.actionEffect: All characters gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Flowers
cards.quote: After the darkest season, the small things bloom first.
cards.actionEffect: Healing blooms cover the land — all characters heal 5 HP.

cards.name: Lightning Storm
cards.quote: From the black heavens came the crack of white fire — and nowhere to hide on the open plain.
cards.actionEffect: All units on exposed terrain (plains, wastelands, desert, shore) have a 15% chance to be struck for 15 HP. Hidden units on exposed terrain are revealed. Cavalry commanders on exposed terrain have a 15% chance to lose a cavalry unit.

cards.name: Wind
cards.quote: The great eagles rode the gale, and even the fell beasts stretched their wings wide.
cards.actionEffect: All flying creatures (Eagles, Nazgul, Dragons) gain +4 movement each turn.
